data.title: Consumers Energy in Michigan is promoting the Home Heating Credit to assist customers in paying energy bills, helping thousands of households annually.
data.description: In Jackson, Michigan, on February 16, 2026, Consumers Energy is geared up for the tax season by assisting customers with applying for the Michigan Home Heating Credit. This credit is crucial for numerous households and aids them in handling their expenses annually. Thousands of households benefit from this credit every year, making it a significant support for many.

data.title: LSU Athletics partners with Woodside Energy for jersey patches, appearing on all 21 competition apparel starting in 2026.
data.description: In an unprecedented move, LSU Athletics has revealed a groundbreaking jersey patch partnership with Woodside Energy in a multi-year deal. This deal signifies a milestone in the collegiate sports model, with Woodside Energy becoming the Official Legacy Partner of LSU Athletics. The agreement will see the Woodside Energy logo prominently displayed on all 21 of LSU's competition apparel, customized to align with the iconic purple and gold color scheme of Louisiana State University. This partnership will come into effect from the 2026 – 2027 season onward, making it a significant development in the world of collegiate athletics.

data.title: Metacon to supply 2,000 NMCH oxygen purification system to Motor Oil Hellas.
data.description: Metacon AB (publ), based in Stockholm, recently announced that it has secured an additional contract to provide a 2,000 NMCH oxygen purification system to Motor Oil (Hellas) Corinth Refineries S.A. in Greece. This contract extension highlights Metacon's growing presence in the energy sector. The system is set to be delivered to Motor Oil as part of the new agreement.

data.title: AIT Worldwide Logistics partners with Greenbriar Equity Group for growth plans in logistics industry.
data.description: A collaboration between AIT Worldwide Logistics and Greenbriar Equity Group in Itasca, Illinois, will facilitate continuity and drive the company's growth plans forward. This partnership aims to accelerate the next phase of development for the company.

data.title: Peter Justen streamlined Medicaid with 12-minute applications, reducing the 200-question process. Verified third-party data saves states billions.
data.description: In the recent Disruption Interruption episode, Peter Justen, CEO of Ameritrust Solutions, discussed streamlining the Medicaid application process from 200 questions to only 12 minutes. Justen highlighted the importance of utilizing verified third-party data, noting that this approach has led to significant cost savings for states, amounting to billions of dollars. Additionally, he emphasized how this innovation has assisted hospitals in recovering revenue efficiently and ensuring greater accuracy in the verification process.

data.title: Vulcan Materials (VMC) to report $2.12 EPS on 2026-02-17. Analysts watch for guidance impact on market. Last beat EPS by $0.14 led to 0.17% stock drop.
data.description: Vulcan Materials (NYSE: VMC) is preparing to reveal its quarterly earnings on Tuesday, February 17, 2026, with analysts forecasting an earnings per share (EPS) of $2.12. The upcoming announcement has generated anticipation among investors, who are eager to see if Vulcan Materials exceeds expectations and provides positive guidance for the next quarter. It is important for new investors to note that while earnings performance is crucial, market reactions are often influenced by the guidance given. In the previous quarter, the company outperformed EPS predictions by $0.14, leading to a 0.17% decrease in share price the following day. For more details, the complete story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Porch Group to attend investor events on Feb 27, Mar 3-4, Mar 9, March 10. (Nasdaq: PRCH)
data.description: Porch Group, Inc. ("Porch") (Nasdaq: PRCH), a innovative homeowners insurance company, revealed its participation in key investor events. Porch Management will attend and engage in individual and group investor sessions at several upcoming events: On February 27, 2026, they will be at the KBW Non-Deal Roadshow in Milwaukee. Following that, on March 3-4, 2026, they will be at the Benchmark Non-Deal Roadshow in San Francisco/Los Angeles. On March 9, 2026, Porch will be participating in the Loop Capital 7th Annual Investor Conference virtually. On March 10, 2026, they will continue their involvement.

data.title: GoNetspeed unveils 6 gigabit speed service in Northeast, covering CT, ME, MA, and NY, with symmetrical upload/download speeds.
data.description: In Rochester, N.Y., GoNetspeed has revealed the introduction of enhanced multigigabit internet speeds, offering up to 6 gigabits per second. This upgrade is now accessible to individuals residing in Connecticut, Maine, Massachusetts, and New York. The rollout of new 3- and 6-gigabit packages provides households with quicker connectivity through the utilization of the company's entirely fiber network. Customers can benefit from symmetrical speeds enabling rapid uploads and downloads, showcasing GoNetspeed's commitment to delivering high-quality internet services.

data.title: Westlake Royal Building Products introduces 5/8” Lap Siding for TruExterior, mimicking real cedar look.
data.description: In Houston, Westlake Royal Building Products, a subsidiary of Westlake Company (NYSE: WLK), is introducing a new 5/8” Lap Siding profile to its TruExterior® Siding & Trim line. This profile combines the traditional lap siding look with the high-performance features of TruExterior’s poly-ash material. The siding has a true 5/8” butt and an appealing aesthetic resembling real cedar. This addition expands the existing product line, offering customers more options for their projects.
Company repurchased 1 million shares as part of buy-back program.

data.title: Healthcare company GRAIL, Inc. (Nasdaq: GRAL) to release 2025 financial results post-market close on Feb. 16, 2026.
data.description: Today, in Menlo Park, California, GRAIL, Inc. (Nasdaq: GRAL), a healthcare firm dedicated to early cancer detection for successful treatment, disclosed that it will release its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and entire year of 2025 after the market closes on February 16, 2026.

data.title: Voyager (NYSE: VOYG) partners with ATMOS for increased access to space; simplifying process for scientific discovery.
data.description: In Denver, Voyager Technologies (NYSE: VOYG) has revealed a new collaboration with ATMOS Space Cargo, a top supplier of orbital cargo and return services. This partnership aims to enhance access to space for scientific exploration and technological progress. President of Space, Defense, and National Security at Voyager, Matt Magaña, emphasized the importance of streamlining the process for customers, stating that they shouldn't need multiple vendors to reach space. This initiative reflects a joint commitment to making space accessible.

data.title: TaskUs, Inc. (Nasdaq: TASK) will report Q4 and full-year 2025 financial results on Feb 25, 2026, post-market close. Responsible for digital services.
data.description: TaskUs, Inc., a prominent provider of outsourced digital services and cutting-edge customer experience solutions to top global companies, is set to announce its financial results for the fourth quarter and full fiscal year on Wednesday, February 25, 2026, after the U.S. market closes. The comprehensive earnings report and additional financial information will be accessible on the Investor Relations page of the company’s website at https://ir.taskus.com. TaskUs is listed on the Nasdaq under the ticker symbol TASK.
